title: verbascum varians var. flexuosum
intro: Verbascum varians var. flexuosum, also known as mullein, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Mullein has various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, soothing skin irritations, and supporting ear and eye health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical creams and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
